firmware.name: Firmware
firmware.description: On-board keyboard firmware: QMK, ZMK, KMK, custom firmware development, matrix scanning, encoders, RGB, BLE, controllers.

remapping-layouts.name: Remapping & Layouts
remapping-layouts.description: User-space key remapping (kanata, Karabiner-Elements, kmonad), layout design, alternative layouts (Colemak, Workman, Dvorak), home-row mods, layers.

splits-ergo.name: Splits & Ergo
splits-ergo.description: Split keyboards, ergonomic boards, columnar staggered, ortholinear, thumb clusters, dactyl, corne, ergodox, lily58, sofle, etc.

builds-hardware.name: Builds & Hardware
builds-hardware.description: DIY builds and build logs, custom PCBs, hot-swap, switches and switch development, hardware design, 3D-printed cases.

keycaps-aesthetics.name: Keycaps & Aesthetics
keycaps-aesthetics.description: Keycap sets and group buys, profile discussion, switches for sound/feel, lubing, foam, lighting, finishes, photographs of finished boards.

tools-software.name: Tools & Software
tools-software.description: Software utilities relevant to keyboard users: launchers, shortcut managers, dotfile/config tools, productivity tools, programming tooling adjacent to the hobby.

group-buys-vendors.name: Group Buys & Vendors
group-buys-vendors.description: GB announcements and updates, vendor drops and sales, restock alerts, vendor news, marketplace discussion.

community.name: Community
community.description: Community discussion, market trends, controversies, polls, surveys, meta posts about the hobby itself.
